evals.prompt: Classify this email as newsletter or not
Run the full newsletter pipeline on my inbox
evals.input: 50 emails in data/gmail-all — mix of newsletters and regular emails
evals.expected: Classification report + newsletters archived to data/archive/ + deletion confirmation for newsletter emails

evals.input: 200 emails, 150 newsletters already in memory DB
evals.expected: Memory handles 70%+ without AI calls, remainder via pattern matching, near-zero AI cost
